SEARCH
Package model

Class TradeOffer

java.lang.Object
model.TradeOffer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class TradeOffer extends Object implements Serializable
TradeOffer class for taking care of trades happening in the village
Author:
GaboraBrave
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • TradeOffer

      public TradeOffer(Villager seller, String tradename, int points, String description)
      4 argument constructor
      Parameters:
      seller - - what to set the seller field to (Villager)
      tradename - - what to set the tradename field to (String)
      points - - what to set the points field to (int)
      description - - what to set the description field to (String)

    • getPossibleBuyers

      public ArrayList<Villager> getPossibleBuyers(ArrayList<Villager> villagers)
      getPossibleBuyers() method
      Parameters:
      villagers - - the list of all villagers in the village (Cloverville)
      Returns:
      possiblebuyers - the ArrayList of Villagers who have enough points to complete the trade using the Villager.checkPoints(int points) method

    • copy

      public TradeOffer copy()
      copy() method creates and returns an identical TradeOffer object
      Returns:
      identical TradeOffer object

    • copywithoutpos

      public TradeOffer copywithoutpos()
      copywithoutpos() method creates and returns an identical Date object only without the ArrayList of possiblebuyers --> used for JSON later
      Returns:
      identical TradeOffer object just without possiblebuyers

    • toString

      public String toString()
      toString() method
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      String value of the concatenated fields tradename + " '" + description + "' [" + points + "] by " + seller
